localizations.name: First Victory
localizations.beforeEarnedDescription: Win your first match to earn this achievement.

localizations.name: Primera Victoria
localizations.beforeEarnedDescription: Gana tu primer partido para desbloquear este logro.

localizations.name: Veteran Player
localizations.beforeEarnedDescription: Play 100 matches to unlock this achievement.
localizations.afterEarnedDescription: You've played 100 matches. You're a veteran!

localizations.name: High Scorer
localizations.beforeEarnedDescription: Score 10,000 points in a single match.
localizations.afterEarnedDescription: Amazing score! You scored 10,000 points in one match.

localizations.name: Grand Marqueur
localizations.beforeEarnedDescription: Marquez 10 000 points en un seul match.
localizations.afterEarnedDescription: Score incroyable! Vous avez marqué 10 000 points en un seul match.
